events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God & Astrophysicist
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! Guitar legend, songwriter, and astrophysicist – what an incredible life. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Still strutting, still singing, still the ultimate rock and roll showman. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: The Day Video Killed Radio
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto our screens, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us! How much did MTV change music for you?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game for Britpop. That album still sounds as fresh and vital as ever. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, hundreds of thousands gathered for Woodstock, three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Which iconic performance stands out for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, in 1977.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. His music and legend continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the tragic passing of guitar icon Jimi Hendrix in 1970; he would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us on this day in 1970. His guitar work still sounds like it's from another planet. What's your favourite Hendrix moment?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Chrissie Hynde
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll pioneer with a voice that's instantly recognisable. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad for it! Liam's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation and a true rock and roll star. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on this day in 1975, spreading its message of peace worldwide.

angles.name: Imagine's Enduring Message
angles.copy: On this day in 1975, John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released in the UK. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music and carry our favourite tunes.

angles.name: The iPod Changed Everything
angles.copy: 25 years ago today, Apple introduced the first iPod. Remember those days of carrying '1,000 songs in your pocket'? How did the iPod change your music habits?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, celebrating the iconic British secret agent and the enduring film series.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, 007 is a true British icon. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to resonate globally. What's your lasting memory of John?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian and actor, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Happy Birthday John Cleese
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the comedy genius, John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, he's given us endless laughs. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?
